zh.lifeSummary: Roger Molon於大約1290年與wife Roger Molon在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Roger Molon于大约1290年与wife Roger Molon在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Molon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish (Boloń): from a derivative of the personal namesBolesław or Boleczest.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: Roger Molon married wife Roger Molon about 1290, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Roger Molon a épousé wife Roger Molon environ 1290, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Roger Molon hat um 1290 in Europa wife Roger Molon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Roger Molon lui sposato wife Roger Molon circa 1290, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Molonは約1290年にヨーロッパでwife Roger Molonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Molon(은)는 대략 1290년 우럽에서 wife Roger Molon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Roger Molon casou-se com wife Roger Molon aproximadamente 1290, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Roger Molon женился на женщине по имени wife Roger Molon около 1290 г. в местности Европа. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Roger Molon se casó con wife Roger Molon aproximadamente 1290, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
